$comment: Structured drink menu that drives the Menus page (services 3,4,5,6). Standard-classic descriptions are generic and accurate; signature/seasonal items and the full milk list stay TODO(owner). Prices are usually package-based, so per-drink price is omitted unless relevant.

items.name: Latte
